pairingTokenRotation.notes: Firmware 1.0.39 lets an explicit Connect replace a missing or stale token. Firmware 1.0.38 still requires its legacy WiFi recovery flow when no valid token remains, so update the Mac App before firmware.

rules.name: v2-usb-first
rules.notes: Companion v1.x negotiates protocol v2 on USB-first firmware when available.

rules.name: v1-stable
rules.notes: Companion v1.x supports firmware v1.x on protocol v1 fallback.
